label: plain_text
text:
For
another
example of e
equally
likely
outcomes, suppose
we
throw a die
once. For us, a die will always mean a fair die. What are t
the possible outcomes?
They are
e 1, 2, 3, 4, 5, 6. Each number has the same possibility of showing up. So
the equally likely outcomes of throwing
g a die
eare
1, 2, 3, 4, 5
and 6.
